arts.ttl: Lazio vs Viktoria Plzen | Europa League | Team News & Probable Lineups
arts.sum: After returning from the Czech Republic with a valuable advantage, Lazio will be looking to finish the job when they host Viktoria Plzen in the second leg of the Europa League Round of 16. The match will take place at the Stadio Olimpico. It kicks off on Thursday, 18:45 local time. Lazio Team News, Injuries, Suspensions & Probable […] The post Lazio vs Viktoria Plzen | Europa League | Team News & Probable Lineups appeared first on The Laziali.

arts.ttl: Bologna vs. Lazio, Champions League implications
arts.sum: They have also made club history: this is the first time since 65/66 that they have scored 44+ goals in their first 28 games of a Serie A campaign (53 in 65/66). Lazio have the second-best attack in Serie A on 50 goals (after Inter and Atalanta, both on 63).
